fields.acceptance_criteria: New ticket dialog/panel with type selector from schema; dynamic required field inputs based on type schema; title, description (markdown), priority, component fields; POST to /api/tickets; success creates and selects new ticket; validation errors shown inline
fields.title: Feature: Ticket creation form with type selection and required fields

fields.acceptance_criteria: New ticket dialog/panel with type selector populated from schema endpoint (189a6068 must be complete first); dynamic required and optional field inputs rendered from schema definition; title, description (markdown textarea from 9d0c7931 component), priority, component fields; auto-save draft to localStorage while composing (cleared on submit/cancel); POST to /api/tickets on submit; validation errors shown inline; redirect to new ticket on success; template support: pre-fill from existing ticket or predefined templates
fields.title: Feature: Ticket creation form with type selection and required fields
